title: matthiola bicornis
intro: Matthiola bicornis, also known as the Horned Stock or Horned Stock Gillyflower, is a biennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. Its health benefits include its potential to relieve coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its ability to act as a natural expectorant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties.
